overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player character walking from the exterior of the Annesburg mine into the underground tunnels. The camera follows railway tracks past wooden mining structures, through the entrance marked 'ANNESBURG MINE', and deep into the dimly lit caverns where miners work with pickaxes and lanterns illuminate the rocky walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor approach to industrial mine entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward the mine entrance, following the train tracks

notable_agents.action: miner standing near the mine entrance, observing the approach

entered.detail: dark wooden structure with external staircase on the left side of the approach
metal railway tracks leading into the mine entrance, surrounded by gravel
stacked sandbags forming a barrier along the right side of the tracks
large rock formations and boulders surrounding the mine entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view approaching the Annesburg mine from the exterior. The camera moves along a dirt trail beside wooden mining structures, with train tracks leading toward a dark tunnel entrance carved into the rocky hillside. A lone miner stands near the entrance as the camera advances steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mine entrance tunnel with wooden supports

events.description: passing from outdoor natural light into the covered mine entrance
ambient light drops significantly as the camera moves under the wooden mine structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the mine entrance, passing under the wooden support beams and approaching the darkness within

notable_agents.action: miner standing beside the tracks holding a tool, watching the camera pass

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign reading 'ANNESBURG MINE' mounted above the entrance
heavy timber beams reinforcing the mine entrance and tunnel ceiling
wooden barrels and storage containers stacked along the right wall
oil lanterns hanging from beams providing dim illumination deeper in the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the mine through a timber-framed portal marked with the 'ANNESBURG MINE' sign. Natural daylight fades as the tunnel narrows, with wooden support beams lining the walls and ceiling. A miner stands to the left holding a tool, while barrels and crates line the right wall. The tracks continue straight into the deepening darkness ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground mine tunnel with active workers

events.description: encountering a group of miners gathered and talking in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the mine, passing groups of miners who are standing and conversing along the tracks

notable_agents.action: group of three miners standing together talking, one with arms crossed

entered.detail: thick timber pillars spaced regularly along the tunnel supporting the ceiling
wooden plank barriers and fencing along the left side of the tracks
wooden carts, crates, and tools stacked along the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the mine, the tunnel is illuminated by hanging oil lanterns casting warm light on timber supports. The camera passes a group of miners standing and conversing on the right side near the tracks. Wooden barriers line the left wall while mining equipment and crates fill the spaces between support pillars. The atmosphere is dim and enclosed, with the tracks curving ahead into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: side alcove with active mining work

events.description: approaching a miner actively working the rock wall with a pickaxe

agents.ego_description: moving through a side tunnel area, observing a miner working the rock face with a pickaxe while another rests nearby

notable_agents.action: miner wearing a headlamp, repeatedly striking the rock wall with a pickaxe

entered.detail: rough-hewn rock and stone walls showing pickaxe marks and mining excavation
mechanical switch mechanism where the railway tracks split and curve

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrower side section of the mine where the walls are raw exposed rock. A miner with a headlamp works diligently on the right, striking the stone wall with a pickaxe while dust falls. The tracks curve and split at a switch mechanism ahead. The lighting is darker here, with shadows cast by the wooden beams overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner mine chamber with track junction

agents.ego_description: navigating through the inner chamber, passing a large wooden container and a resting miner

notable_agents.action: miner sitting on the ground with legs extended, resting against a wooden post

entered.detail: massive wooden crate or storage container sitting between the railway tracks
rusted metal barrel standing upright near the tracks
thick ropes or cables hanging down from the ceiling beams on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a wider inner chamber where the railway tracks form a junction around a large wooden container. A miner sits resting on the left side near the wall, while various barrels and mining supplies are scattered about. Hanging cables drape from the ceiling beams, and the warm glow of lanterns illuminates the dusty air. The camera continues forward through this industrial underground space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the bright exterior of a mining site into the deep, claustrophobic depths of an underground cavern. It begins on a dirt trail beside wooden structures, moving along railway tracks toward a dark tunnel entrance carved into a rocky hillside. As the camera passes under the Annesburg Mine sign, natural daylight fades into a dim interior lined with timber supports, barrels, and crates. The scene then shifts deeper into the mine where hanging oil lanterns cast a warm glow over conversing miners and curving tracks, before narrowing into a raw rock corridor where a worker strikes the wall with a pickaxe. Finally, the camera emerges into a wider inner chamber featuring a railway junction and scattered supplies, moving through the dusty, lantern-lit industrial space.
